name: Postman
description: API development platform for building, testing, and documenting APIs. Collections, environments, and team collaboration.

name: Insomnia
description: Open-source API client for REST, GraphQL, and gRPC. Environment variables, code generation, and plugin system.

name: HTTPie
description: User-friendly API testing client with a clean interface. Automatic syntax highlighting, JSON formatting, and sessions.

name: Bruno
description: Offline-first, open-source API client. Stores collections in plain text files on your filesystem using Bru markup.

name: Hoppscotch
description: Open-source API development ecosystem. Lightweight web-based client for REST, GraphQL, WebSocket, and SSE testing.

name: Thunder Client
description: Lightweight REST API client extension for VS Code. GUI-based testing without leaving your editor.

name: RapidAPI
description: API marketplace and hub for discovering, testing, and connecting to thousands of public APIs from one dashboard.

name: RapidAPI for Mac (Paw)
description: Native macOS API client with visual request building, dynamic values, code generation, and team sync.

name: Kreya
description: GUI client for gRPC, REST, and WebSocket APIs. Protobuf support, environment management, and scripting.

name: Yaak
description: Desktop API client built with Rust and Tauri. Fast, lightweight alternative with environments, auth helpers, and plugins.

name: Swagger / OpenAPI
description: Industry-standard specification for describing REST APIs. Swagger UI renders interactive documentation from OpenAPI specs.

name: Redoc
description: Generates beautiful, responsive API documentation from OpenAPI specs. Three-panel layout with deep linking.

name: Stoplight
description: API design and documentation platform. Visual OpenAPI editor, style guides, and hosted documentation portals.

name: ReadMe
description: Developer hub platform for API documentation. Interactive API explorer, changelog, metrics, and custom branding.

name: Slate
description: Beautiful static API documentation generator inspired by Stripe's docs. Markdown-based with a three-column layout.

name: Mintlify
description: Modern documentation platform for developer tools. MDX-based with API playground, analytics, and versioning.

name: Scalar
description: Open-source API reference generator from OpenAPI specs. Modern UI, request examples, and interactive playground.

name: Bump.sh
description: API documentation and changelog platform. Auto-generates docs from OpenAPI and AsyncAPI specs with diff tracking.

name: Speakeasy
description: Generates production-quality, type-safe SDKs from OpenAPI specs. Supports multiple languages with idiomatic code output.

name: Fern
description: API development platform that generates SDKs, documentation, and server boilerplate from API definitions.

name: Stainless
description: Generates best-in-class SDKs from OpenAPI specs. Powers SDKs for OpenAI, Cloudflare, and other major APIs.

name: Apollo Studio
description: Cloud platform for managing GraphQL APIs. Schema registry, operation metrics, and federated graph management.

name: GraphiQL
description: In-browser IDE for exploring GraphQL APIs. Auto-complete, syntax highlighting, query history, and documentation explorer.

name: Hasura
description: Instant GraphQL and REST APIs on new or existing databases. Real-time subscriptions, auth, and remote joins.

name: Relay
description: Production GraphQL client for React by Meta. Compiler-driven data fetching with automatic batching and caching.

name: urql
description: Lightweight, extensible GraphQL client for JavaScript frameworks. Normalized caching, SSR, and offline support.

name: Stellate
description: GraphQL edge caching and analytics platform. CDN-level caching for GraphQL APIs with rate limiting and metrics.

name: Apollo Client
description: Full-featured GraphQL client for JavaScript. Normalized cache, local state management, and framework integrations.

name: Altair GraphQL Client
description: Feature-rich GraphQL IDE with file uploads, subscriptions, query collections, and plugin support across platforms.

name: GraphQL Voyager
description: Interactive visual explorer for GraphQL schemas. Renders schema as a graph to understand types and relationships.

name: WunderGraph
description: API gateway framework that composes GraphQL, REST, and databases into a single virtual graph with type-safe clients.

name: GraphQL Code Generator
description: Generates typed code from GraphQL schemas and operations. Plugins for TypeScript, React hooks, resolvers, and more.

name: GraphQL Mesh
description: Unifies REST, gRPC, SOAP, and database sources into a single GraphQL API. Schema stitching and transforms built in.
